---
title: "Figure 5 (covariance lines) — macro_IR corrected parameter covariance vs interval, two colourings"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Line view of the DIAGONAL of the CORRECTED (sandwich) parameter covariance vs interval, per-recording
(group of 100): battery covariance x 1/100. NO N_ch normalisation here (each N_ch is analysed
separately, so the trivial 1/N_ch factor is left in and the curves simply stack by N_ch). log y.
Two colourings, ONE Rmd:
  A: colour = N_ch,  facet parameter x noise         -> Figure_5_covariance_lines_bynoise.pdf
  B: colour = noise, facet N_ch (rows) x parameter   -> Figure_5_covariance_lines_bynch.pdf
ALGO = macro_IR.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR   <- "../data/433ed13"
NSIM       <- 10000
NOISES     <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
ALGO       <- "macro_IR"
GROUP_SIZE <- 100
COV_SCALE  <- 1 / GROUP_SIZE

ORD       <- c("on", "off", "unitary_current", "Num_ch_mean")
PIDX      <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
               unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")
NOISE_COL <- c("0.1" = "#0072B2", "1" = "#009E73", "10" = "#D55E00")
```

```{r read}
read_tagged <- function(z) {
  files <- Sys.glob(file.path(DATA_DIR,
    sprintf("figure_3_nch_*_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_battery_sim.csv", NSIM, ALGO, z)))
  map_dfr(files, ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% mutate(noise = z))
}
bsim <- map_dfr(NOISES, read_tagged)

d0 <- bsim %>%
  filter(component_path == "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance",
         statistic == "value", probit == "mean", param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX) %>%
  mutate(param_name = names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)]) %>%
  group_by(noise, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name) %>%
  summarise(cov = mean(value) * COV_SCALE, .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(cov), cov > 0,
         !(noise == "10" & Num_ch == 5))   # noise 10 / N_ch 5: sandwich unstable, drop

nch_lev <- sort(unique(d0$Num_ch))
dd <- d0 %>%
  mutate(param  = factor(param_name, levels = ORD, labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[ORD])),
         noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)),
         noisec = factor(noise, levels = NOISES),
         nch_f  = factor(Num_ch, levels = nch_lev, labels = paste0("N==", nch_lev)),
         Nch    = factor(Num_ch, levels = nch_lev))
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.0, fig.height = 8.0, results = "asis"}
common <- list(
  geom_line(linewidth = .4), geom_point(size = .7),
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(.01, .1, 1)), scale_y_log10(),
  labs(x = expression(Delta / tau[min]), y = expression(Cov[diag]~"(corrected, per 100-ch recording)")),
  theme_bw(base_size = 9),
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "right",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 8), plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold")))

gA <- ggplot(dd, aes(interval_in_tau, cov, colour = Nch, group = Num_ch)) + common +
  facet_wrap(vars(param, noisef), ncol = 3, scales = "free", labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed)) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(name = expression(N[ch]), end = .9) +
  ggtitle("macro_IR  corrected covariance (diagonal) vs interval, by N_ch")

gB <- ggplot(dd, aes(interval_in_tau, cov, colour = noisec, group = noise)) + common +
  facet_wrap(vars(nch_f, param), ncol = 4, scales = "free", labeller = label_parsed) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = NOISE_COL, name = "noise") +
  ggtitle("macro_IR  corrected covariance (diagonal) vs interval, by noise")

# same by-N_ch layout but N_ch-CORRECTED (y = N_ch x Cov): the curves collapse where Cov ~ 1/N_ch
# (kinetics) and fan out where the 1/N_ch gain saturates (the i / N_ch degeneracy).
gN <- ggplot(dd, aes(interval_in_tau, Num_ch * cov, colour = Nch, group = Num_ch)) + common +
  facet_wrap(vars(param, noisef), ncol = 3, scales = "free", labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed)) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(name = expression(N[ch]), end = .9) +
  labs(y = expression(N[ch] %*% Cov[diag]~"(corrected)")) +
  ggtitle("macro_IR  N_ch-corrected covariance (N_ch x Cov) vs interval, by N_ch")

ggsave("Figure_5_covariance_lines_bynoise.pdf",       gA, width = 7.0, height = 8.0)
ggsave("Figure_5_covariance_lines_bynch.pdf",         gB, width = 7.0, height = 11.0)
ggsave("Figure_5_covariance_lines_bynoise_Ncorr.pdf", gN, width = 7.0, height = 8.0)
gA; gB; gN
```
